analyzing.title: AI Analysis

facts.fact1: Plant diseases cost farmers billions annually worldwide, making early detection crucial for food security.
facts.fact2: AI can detect plant diseases up to 98% accurately, often better than human experts in controlled conditions.
facts.fact3: Over 80% of plant diseases are caused by fungi, making moisture and humidity key factors.
facts.fact4: Early disease detection can reduce crop losses by up to 40% and minimize pesticide usage.
facts.fact5: Some plant diseases can spread through wind, water, insects, or contaminated tools within hours.
facts.fact6: Healthy soil with good microorganisms can naturally suppress many plant diseases.

requirements.clearView: Clear view of plant leaves or crops
requirements.focusPlant: Focus on diseased or healthy plant parts

diseasePrediction.errorRecommendation: Please ensure the API server is running on port 8001 and try again.
diseasePrediction.errorSolution: Check your internet connection and verify the backend server is running.
